---
title: "Size vs. Bd modeling: Panamá preliminary results"
author: Cob Staines
date: 2025-09-29
format:
  html:
    toc: true
df-print: kable
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ecology.csl
---
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse,  RPostgres, DBI, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr, dbplyr, janitor, here, brms, cmdstanr, tidybayes, patchwork)

```

# Load data
```{r}

load(here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", "brms_data_gam_2026-04-06.RData"))

species_list = brms_data %>%
  select(taxon_capture) %>%
           distinct() %>%
  arrange(taxon_capture)

raca_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae")
ramu_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_muscosa")
rasi_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_sierrae")
racb_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_catesbeiana")
rapi_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_pipiens")
racl_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_clamitans")
pscr_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "pseudacris_crucifer")
copa_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "colostethus_panamansis")
liwa_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "lithobates_warszewitschii")
sifl_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "silverstoneia_flotator")

```

# Load unified model

```{r}
# m9a_zln
unified_model = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_unified", "unified_models/unified_model_results_zln_life_tax_env2_renvpoptls_30.rds"))

# hu

taxon_linear_hu <- spread_draws(unified_model,
    b_hu_precip_mm_10_z,
    b_hu_temp_c_30_z,
    r_taxon_capture__hu[taxon_capture, term]
  ) |>
  filter(taxon_capture %in% species_list$taxon_capture) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = r_taxon_capture__hu) |>
  mutate(
    precip_linear_total = b_hu_precip_mm_10_z + precip_mm_10_z,
    temp_linear_total   = b_hu_temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z
  ) |>
  group_by(taxon_capture) |>
  summarise(
    precip_linear_hu_mean = mean(precip_linear_total),
    precip_linear_hu_sd   = sd(precip_linear_total),
    temp_linear_hu_mean   = mean(temp_linear_total),
    temp_linear_hu_sd     = sd(temp_linear_total)
  )

fixed_quad_hu <- spread_draws(unified_model,
    b_hu_Iprecip_mm_10_zE2,
    b_hu_Itemp_c_30_zE2
  ) |>
  summarise(
    precip_quad_hu_mean = mean(b_hu_Iprecip_mm_10_zE2),
    precip_quad_hu_sd   = sd(b_hu_Iprecip_mm_10_zE2),
    temp_quad_hu_mean   = mean(b_hu_Itemp_c_30_zE2),
    temp_quad_hu_sd     = sd(b_hu_Itemp_c_30_zE2)
  )

# b
taxon_weather_hu = taxon_linear_hu %>%
  cross_join(fixed_quad_hu)

taxon_linear_b <- spread_draws(unified_model,
    b_precip_mm_10_z,
    b_temp_c_30_z,
    r_taxon_capture[taxon_capture, term]
  ) |>
  filter(taxon_capture %in% species_list$taxon_capture) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = r_taxon_capture) |>
  mutate(
    precip_linear_total = b_precip_mm_10_z + precip_mm_10_z,
    temp_linear_total   = b_temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z
  ) |>
  group_by(taxon_capture) |>
  summarise(
    precip_linear_b_mean = mean(precip_linear_total),
    precip_linear_b_sd   = sd(precip_linear_total),
    temp_linear_b_mean   = mean(temp_linear_total),
    temp_linear_b_sd     = sd(temp_linear_total)
  )

fixed_quad_b <- spread_draws(unified_model,
    b_Iprecip_mm_10_zE2,
    b_Itemp_c_30_zE2
  ) |>
  summarise(
    precip_quad_b_mean = mean(b_Iprecip_mm_10_zE2),
    precip_quad_b_sd   = sd(b_Iprecip_mm_10_zE2),
    temp_quad_b_mean   = mean(b_Itemp_c_30_zE2),
    temp_quad_b_sd     = sd(b_Itemp_c_30_zE2)
  )

taxon_weather_b = taxon_linear_b %>%
  cross_join(fixed_quad_b)

taxon_weather = taxon_weather_hu %>%
  left_join(taxon_weather_b, by = "taxon_capture")
```

# Modeling
## Model setup
```{r}
# build prior

build_spp_prior <- function(species, taxon_weather) {
  
  spp_weather <- taxon_weather |> filter(taxon_capture == species)
  
  # Extract all values first as plain numerics
  pl_b_m  <- spp_weather$precip_linear_b_mean
  pl_b_s  <- spp_weather$precip_linear_b_sd
  pq_b_m  <- spp_weather$precip_quad_b_mean
  pq_b_s  <- spp_weather$precip_quad_b_sd
  tl_b_m  <- spp_weather$temp_linear_b_mean
  tl_b_s  <- spp_weather$temp_linear_b_sd
  tq_b_m  <- spp_weather$temp_quad_b_mean
  tq_b_s  <- spp_weather$temp_quad_b_sd

  pl_hu_m <- spp_weather$precip_linear_hu_mean
  pl_hu_s <- spp_weather$precip_linear_hu_sd
  pq_hu_m <- spp_weather$precip_quad_hu_mean
  pq_hu_s <- spp_weather$precip_quad_hu_sd
  tl_hu_m <- spp_weather$temp_linear_hu_mean
  tl_hu_s <- spp_weather$temp_linear_hu_sd
  tq_hu_m <- spp_weather$temp_quad_hu_mean
  tq_hu_s <- spp_weather$temp_quad_hu_sd

  sp_prior <- c(
    # mu submodel (class = "b")
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", pl_b_m, ",", pl_b_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", coef = "precip_mm_10_z"),
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", pq_b_m, ",", pq_b_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", coef = "Iprecip_mm_10_zE2"),
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", tl_b_m, ",", tl_b_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", coef = "temp_c_30_z"),
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", tq_b_m, ",", tq_b_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", coef = "Itemp_c_30_zE2"),

    # hu submodel (class = "b", dpar = "hu")
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", pl_hu_m, ",", pl_hu_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", dpar = "hu", coef = "precip_mm_10_z"),
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", pq_hu_m, ",", pq_hu_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", dpar = "hu", coef = "Iprecip_mm_10_zE2"),
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", tl_hu_m, ",", tl_hu_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", dpar = "hu", coef = "temp_c_30_z"),
    prior_string(paste0("normal(", tq_hu_m, ",", tq_hu_s, ")"),
                 class = "b", dpar = "hu", coef = "Itemp_c_30_zE2")
  )
  
  return(sp_prior)
}

set_cmdstan_path(Sys.getenv("cmd_stan_path"))
```

## Model fitting
```{r}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show model fitting code"

# null model
# null_zln <- brm(
#   bd_load_co_density ~ 1,
#   data = brms_data,
#   family = hurdle_lognormal(),
#   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
#   chains = 4,
#   iter = 2000,
#   warmup = 1000,
#   seed = 124,
#   cores = 4,
#   backend = "cmdstanr"
# )
# 
# null_zln <- add_criterion(null_zln, "loo")
# 
# saveRDS(null_zln, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_null.rds"))
# null_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_null.rds"))

# m1_zln <- brm(
#   formula  =  bf(
#     bd_load_co_density ~ s(svl_mm, by = taxon_capture) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture),
#     hu ~ s(svl_mm, by = taxon_capture) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture),
#     sigma ~ 1 + taxon_capture +  (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture)
#   ),
#   data     = brms_data,
#   family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
#   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
#   chains   = 4,
#   iter     = 2000,
#   warmup   = 1000,
#   seed     = 124,
#   cores    = 4,
#   backend = "cmdstanr"
# )
# 
# m1_zln <- add_criterion(m1_zln, "loo")
# 
# saveRDS(m1_zln, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m1.rds"))
# m1_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m1.rds"))
# 
# # RACA
# m2_formula = bf(
#     bd_load_co_density ~ is_metamorph + s(svl_mm, by = is_not_metamorph) + (1 | population) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2),
#     hu ~  is_metamorph + s(svl_mm, by = is_not_metamorph) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2),
#     sigma ~ 1 +  (1 | population) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2)
#   )
# 
# m2_zln_raca <- brm(
#   formula  =  m2_formula,
#   data     = raca_data,
#   family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
#   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
#   chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
#   seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
# )
# 
# m2_zln_raca <- add_criterion(m2_zln_raca, "loo")
# 
# saveRDS(m2_zln_raca, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_raca.rds"))
# m2_zln_raca = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_raca.rds"))
# 
# # RAMU
# m2_zln_ramu <- brm(
#   formula  =  m2_formula,
#   data     = ramu_data,
#   family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
#   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
#   chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
#   seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
# )
# 
# m2_zln_ramu <- add_criterion(m2_zln_ramu, "loo")
# 
# saveRDS(m2_zln_ramu, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_ramu.rds"))
# m2_zln_ramu = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_ramu.rds"))
# 
# # RASI
# m2_zln_rasi <- brm(
#   formula  =  m2_formula,
#   data     = rasi_data,
#   family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
#   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
#   chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
#   seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
# )
# 
# m2_zln_rasi <- add_criterion(m2_zln_rasi, "loo")
# 
# saveRDS(m2_zln_rasi, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_rasi.rds"))
# m2_zln_rasi = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_rasi.rds"))


m3_formula = bf(
  bd_load_co_density ~ 1 +
    is_metamorph + s(svl_mm, by = is_not_metamorph) +
    (precip_mm_10_z + I(precip_mm_10_z^2) + temp_c_30_z + I(temp_c_30_z^2)) + 
    (1 | population:life_stage_simple),
  hu ~ 1 +
    is_metamorph + s(svl_mm, by = is_not_metamorph) +
    (precip_mm_10_z + I(precip_mm_10_z^2) + temp_c_30_z + I(temp_c_30_z^2)) + 
    (1 | population:life_stage_simple),
  sigma ~ 1 +
    (1 | population)
)

model_svl_by_species = function(model_data, taxon_weather) {
  # check model_data
  species_name = unique(model_data$taxon_capture)
  if (length(species_name) > 1) {
    stop("Multiple taxon_capture values found in model_data, aborting.")
  }
  cat(paste0("Modeling Bd vs SVL for: ", species_name), "\n")
  
  m3_spp_prior = build_spp_prior(species_name, taxon_weather)
  
  m3_zln <- brm(
    formula  =  m3_formula,
    data     = model_data,
    family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
    prior = m3_spp_prior,
    control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
    chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
    seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
  )
  
  cat("Adding LOO...\n")
  m3_zln <- add_criterion(m3_zln, "loo")
  
  cat("Saving model...\n")
  saveRDS(m3_zln, file = here(paste0("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m3_", species_name, ".rds")))
  cat("Done.\n")
}

model_svl_by_species(copa_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(liwa_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(pscr_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(raca_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(racb_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(racl_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(ramu_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(rapi_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(rasi_data, taxon_weather)
model_svl_by_species(sifl_data, taxon_weather)


```
